name: MediaNews Group/Tribune Publishing
description: Tribune Publishing, now a subsidiary of MediaNews Group (owned by Alden Global Capital), is a prominent American media company that publishes a diverse portfolio of daily and weekly newspapers. The organization is dedicated to delivering high-quality journalism, enterprise reporting, and breaking news to local communities across the United States. Through its extensive network of publications, including major titles like the Chicago Tribune and The Baltimore Sun, the company provides essential information and multimedia experiences to millions of readers, maintaining a strong commitment to local news coverage and digital engagement in an evolving media landscape.
